contact.tpl.custom.label: Custom
contact.title: Contact customer
contact.description: Send the recipient of this shipment an email directly from the system.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.tpl.address_incomplete.label: Incomplete address
contact.tpl.address_incomplete.subject: Your order {{shipmentNumber}} – delivery address incomplete
contact.tpl.address_incomplete.body:
unfortunately the delivery address for your order {{shipmentNumber}} is incomplete (e.g. missing street and house number).

Could you reply to this email with your complete address? As soon as we have it, your parcel will go out right away.

Thank you and best regards
contact.tpl.out_of_stock.label: Out of stock
contact.tpl.out_of_stock.subject: Your order {{shipmentNumber}} – a quick note on availability
contact.tpl.out_of_stock.body:
thank you for your order {{shipmentNumber}}.

Unfortunately one of the ordered items is currently out of stock. We are arranging a quick restock and will get back to you as soon as we know more. You're also welcome to let us know if we should ship the remaining items in advance.

Thanks for your patience and best regards
contact.tpl.shipping_delay.label: Shipping delay
contact.tpl.shipping_delay.subject: Your order {{shipmentNumber}} – a short shipping delay
contact.tpl.shipping_delay.body:
thank you for your order {{shipmentNumber}}.

Unfortunately shipping is currently delayed a little. We're doing our best to get your parcel on its way as quickly as possible and will let you know as soon as it has shipped.

Thank you for your understanding and best regards
contact.tpl.holiday.label: Holiday closure
contact.tpl.holiday.subject: Your order {{shipmentNumber}} – shipping after our holiday closure
contact.tpl.holiday.body:
thank you for your order {{shipmentNumber}}.

We are currently on a holiday closure, so shipping may be slightly delayed. Your parcel will be processed and shipped right after we're back. You'll of course receive a notification as soon as it's on its way.

Thank you for your patience and best regards
contact.tpl.partial_shipment.label: Partial shipment
contact.tpl.partial_shipment.subject: Your order {{shipmentNumber}} – partial shipment
contact.tpl.partial_shipment.body:
thank you for your order {{shipmentNumber}}.

We're sending you part of your order now so you don't have to wait any longer. The remaining items will follow as soon as they're available – at no extra shipping cost to you.

Best regards
contact.tpl.order_question.label: Question about the order
contact.tpl.order_question.subject: A question about your order {{shipmentNumber}}
contact.tpl.order_question.body:
thank you for your order {{shipmentNumber}}.

We have a quick question about your order:

[Please add your question here]

As soon as we hear from you, we'll take care of shipping right away.

Best regards
contact.tpl.confirm_details.label: Confirm details
contact.tpl.confirm_details.subject: Please confirm your details for order {{shipmentNumber}}
contact.tpl.confirm_details.body:
thank you for your order {{shipmentNumber}}.

Before we ship your parcel, we'd like to quickly confirm your details. Please review your delivery and contact information and let us know if everything is correct.

Thank you and best regards

Name: Name
Start managing your inventory and shipme: Start managing your inventory and shipments
Warehouse module required: The Warehouse module is required for this feature.
Connect your Shopify store: Connect your Shopify store to sync orders, inventory and fulfillments
Access Token Help: Create a Custom App in your Shopify Admin → Settings → Apps and sales channels → Develop apps. Required scopes: read_products, read_orders, write_orders, read_inventory, write_inventory, read_locations, write_fulfillments.
Disconnect confirmation: This will remove all product and location mappings. Existing shipments from Shopify orders will not be deleted.
No Shopify products loaded: No Shopify products loaded. Click "Fetch Products" to load them from your store.
Primary Location Help: The primary location is used as the default source warehouse for imported Shopify orders.
No Shopify locations loaded: No Shopify locations loaded. Click "Fetch Locations" to load them from your store.
Auto-Create Shipments Help: Automatically create draft shipments in the warehouse when Shopify orders are imported.
Auto-Export Fulfillment Help: Automatically send fulfillment confirmation to Shopify when a shipment is marked as shipped.
Order Status Filter Help: Only import orders with these financial statuses from Shopify.
No sync logs yet: No sync logs yet. Run a sync to see the history.
Shopify module required: Shopify integration requires the Warehouse Professional or Business module.
Not enough space! Exceeds capacity by {{: Not enough space! Exceeds capacity by {{excess}}
Based on product dimensions (no packagin: Based on product dimensions (no packaging dims)

Billing number must be at least 10 chara: Billing number must be at least 10 characters
14-digit DHL billing number for domestic: 14-digit DHL billing number for domestic (V01PAK). Format: EKP(10) + 01 + participation(2).
Required for shipments outside the home: Required for shipments outside the home country. Format: EKP(10) + 53 + participation(2). Must be activated in your DHL business contract.
DHL not configured: DHL is not configured. Please set up your credentials first.
Weight required for DHL label: Weight is required to create a DHL label
This will cancel the DHL shipment and re: This will cancel the DHL shipment and remove the tracking number.
DHL requires professional: DHL integration requires the Warehouse Professional or Business module.
No dimensions available: No dimensions available — please add product or packaging dimensions
Single item shipping required: Single item shipping required — product exceeds all standard carton sizes
Expert AI advisors for your warehouse op: Expert AI advisors for your warehouse operations
Shipping Expert Description: Optimal carton sizing, carrier selection, cost optimization, pallet & container planning, international shipping advice.
Space Planner Description: Storage capacity analysis, zone configuration, layout optimization, bin placement, capacity forecasting.
Intelligence Analyst Description: Demand forecasting, stock optimization, reorder point tuning, seasonal trends, KPI benchmarking.
Allwissender Assistent Description: Knows your full product catalog, every packaging with material & weight, compliance setup (WEEE/LUCID), shipments and stock. Ask anything.

Very tight fit — allow room for padding: Very tight fit — allow room for padding
An item is over 50 kg per unit. Check th: An item is over 50 kg per unit. Check the batch form: the field expects grams (g), not kilograms. A 1.27 kg product should be entered as 1270.
Search by name, company, or email: Search by name, company, or email
DHL bills by the weight you print. Weigh: DHL bills by the weight you print. Weigh the packed box and adjust if needed.
Carton and carrier fit calculations use: Carton and carrier fit calculations use only items with L×W×H set. Their weight still counts. Add dimensions on the product or batch to include them.
Package exceeds max weight or dimensions: Package exceeds max weight or dimensions for all of this carrier’s services.
Prices exclude customs, duties, fuel sur: Prices exclude customs, duties, fuel surcharge, island/peak. ±15–25% accuracy.
Camera is already in use by another app.
Camera API not available. Open this page: Camera API not available. Open this page in Safari (HTTPS) — not inside an app webview.
Camera permission denied. Open Safari Se: Camera permission denied. Open Safari Settings → Websites → Camera → Allow.

{{name}} steht nur 1× auf der Sendung un: {{name}} is on the shipment only once and has already been confirmed.
Kein Produkt mit GTIN {{gtin}} in dieser: No product with GTIN {{gtin}} in this shipment.
Ich möchte dieses Produkt trotzdem als z: I want to add this product anyway as an extra position (e.g. as a gift).
Fügen Sie eine zusätzliche Position zur: Add an extra position to the shipment — e.g. a promotional gift, freebie or goodie. Stock is reserved automatically.
Kein verfügbarer Bestand für dieses Prod: No available stock for this product
Position wird mit 0,00 € verrechnet und: Item is invoiced at €0.00 and shown as a freebie on the delivery note.
Bitte zuerst einen Spediteur in der Vers: Please select a carrier in the Shipping card first.
Die Sendung wird von \"{{from}}\" zurück: The shipment will be reverted from "{{from}}" back to "{{to}}".
Die bereits abgebuchten Bestände werden: Stock that was already deducted will be automatically re-reserved. Shipping timestamps will be cleared.
Hinweis: Ein an Shopify gemeldetes Fulfi: Note: a fulfillment already pushed to Shopify must be cancelled separately by hand — this step does not notify Shopify.
Status gelockt — bitte erst zurück auf V: Status locked — revert to Packed first
Charge oder Menge dieser Sendungspositio: Adjust the batch or quantity of this shipment item. Reserved stock is updated automatically.
Keine Charge mit verfügbarem Bestand. Ak: No batch with available stock. Enable "Allow batch without stock" below to assign anyway.
Charge ohne Bestand zulassen (für Sonder: Allow batch without stock (for special cases / backorder)
Bestand reduzieren ohne Sendung — für We: Reduce stock without a shipment — for promotional gifts, testers, donations, own use or damage.
{{n}} Stück werden als „{{reason}}\" aus: {{n}} units will be written off as "{{reason}}"
{{n}} Positionen ({{q}} Stück gesamt) we: {{n}} items ({{q}} units total) will be written off as "{{reason}}"
Wo ist mein Bestand hingegangen? Versand: Where did my stock go? Shipments, influencers, donations, damage — all at a glance.
Noch keine Empfänger erfasst — gib bei W: No recipients tracked yet — set a recipient in the write-off dialog for promo gifts, testers and donations.
Choose whether each shipment status tran: Choose whether each shipment status transition requires per-item scan confirmation.
Open scan dialog when transitioning to \: Open the scan dialog when transitioning to "Picked" and confirm each item individually.
Open the scan dialog when transitioning to "Packed" and confirm each item individually.
All positions from this shipment will mo: All positions from this shipment will move into the selected target. This shipment will then be cancelled.
No other open shipments to merge with.
Comprehensive shipment analytics with ch: Comprehensive shipment analytics with charts, top lists and full-detail export.

{{name}} ({{email}}) will receive an ema: {{name}} ({{email}}) will receive an email with a link to review the following variants. A separate review is created per variant — responses are checked by you before publication.
Sending again is usually not necessary.

A review request was already sent for this shipment.
